location_complexity: high — Los Cabos coastal premiums, premium labor and materials market
scope_complexity: medium-high — pool adds significant cost in coastal environment
fit_notes: Client has clear program intent and realistic timeline. Budget of $200K for a 216 sqm house with pool in Los Cabos is likely under-budgeted by 40-60% given local market rates. Project is viable if scope is adjusted — recommend proceeding to programming with explicit budget alignment discussion. Strong design engagement signals genuine project intent.
